calendar.matters:
MOTION - Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment With Respect To Cynthia Michellucci Only
Off Calendar Mar-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY's MOTION For Order Setting Aside Judgment With Respect To Cynthia Michellucci Only.

Plaintiff's motion for an order setting aside the judgment entered on or about January 26, 2011 only with respect to Defendant Cynthia Michellucci, individually and dba Tara Cabinets, and dismissing Ms. Michellucci with prejudice, is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and verbatim with the court's ruling.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
